metadata.name: Apply a Promo Code at Checkout

description: A customer is at the checkout page and wants to apply a promotional code for a discount.

nodes.task_description: Navigate to the checkout page with items in the cart.

expected_outcome.expected: The customer is ready to complete their purchase.

nodes.task_description: Enter a valid promo code into the designated field.
The system validates the code and applies the discount to the order total.

expected_outcome.expected: The order total is updated to reflect the discount, and the customer can complete the purchase at the lower price.
